title: Assignment of wire to other portions of itself creates a VGate.cpp:1004 Internal Error

features.name: wire part-select self-assignment with reduction operator
features.description: Code should include a wire assignment where the right-hand side uses a reduction operator on a part-select of the same wire being assigned to

features.name: wire self-assignment with sequential bit references
features.description: Code should include sequential wire self-assignments where later bits reference earlier bits of the same wire
